full_text:
Du Ji (Bohou) 杜畿 (伯侯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Du Ji (杜畿), styledBohou (伯侯), was born in Duling county, Jingzhao commandery. Judged the best administrator in the empire, kept the people of Hedong loyal to Wei. Du Ji was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and the Wei Kingdom. Du Ji lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
